meaning: n.不满,生气,愤怒vt.伤害...自尊心,使...生气
examples: She went off in a fit of pique.
Mimi had got over her pique at Susan's refusal to accept the job.
When he realized nobody was listening to him, he left in a fit of pique.
When Curiosity approached the volcanic rock, there was never really any expectation that it would pique great excitement.
Teammate Pique reflected on one of the worst reverses in the history of a proud club.
